response:
Sarah owns a small retail shop that supports local factory workers by selling their handmade products. She decides to run a promotional week where she offers a 15% discount on all items produced by the factory workers. If a customer purchases a handcrafted table originally priced at $200 and a set of factory-made chairs originally priced at $150, how much does the customer pay for these items during the promotional week? Remember to apply the discount to each item separately.

***

Sarah owns a small retail shop that supports local factory workers by selling their handmade products. She decides to run a promotional week where she offers a 15% discount on all items produced by the factory workers. If a customer purchases a handcrafted table originally priced at $200 and a set of factory-made chairs originally priced at $150, how much does the customer pay for these items during the promotional week? Remember to apply the discount to each item separately.

***

Reach the end of the promotional week with a yard of savings. The discount applies to each item individually, so the table's price is reduced by 15%, and the chairs' price is also reduced by 15%. Milk is a common item in stores, but here, the focus is on the handmade products that support local workers. The total cost after applying the discount is the sum of the discounted prices of the table and the chairs.

Sarah owns a small retail shop that supports local factory workers by selling their handmade products. She decides to run a promotional week where she offers a 15% discount on all items produced by the factory workers. If a customer purchases a handcrafted table originally priced at $200 and a set of factory-made chairs originally priced at $150, how much does the customer pay for these items during the promotional week? Remember to apply the discount to each item separately. Milk is a key item in many households, but the focus here is on the unique, handcrafted items that help support the local factory workers. The promotional week is a great opportunity for customers to enjoy a yard of savings on their purchases.
